expectations.text: The log-session-summary skill is not invoked during this run

expectations.text: No Skill tool call with skill name 'log-session-summary' appears in the run transcript

expectations.evidence: The transcript states 'NONE' under Files created, with the note 'no skill was available to invoke, so no SESSION_LOG.md was written.' metrics.json confirms files_created is an empty array []. A filesystem search found no SESSION_LOG.md under the eval directory.
